description: Execute a Low Surface Brightness (LSB) galaxy survey for Malin 1, Malin 2, and UGC 1382 using coordinates found in ~/Documents/lsb_targets.txt. For each target, capture four 25-second LIGHT exposures in the directory /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/targets/<target_name>/ and generate a sky view image at /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/targets/<target_name>/view.png using the command 'bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/targets/<target_name>/view.png --palette cool'. Perform dark calibration by capturing five 25-second DARK frames in /home/ga/Images/LSB_survey/calibration/darks_25s/. Record the names of the three targets in a survey report at ~/Documents/lsb_survey_report.txt.
